defects.title: Real eBay JD missing
defects.description: The live pilot cannot run JD Intelligence or Assembly without the source job description.
defects.live_pilot_effect: Blocks live generation, comparison, scoring, and export readiness.
defects.root_cause: Input artifact not present in tracked or ignored repository files.
defects.recommended_fix: Add the real eBay JD as a local ignored file or sanitized tracked text, then rerun the pilot.
defects.immediate_workaround: Use scaffold only; do not fabricate JD analysis.
defects.regression_test_required: Add live-pilot preflight check for source_jd_path.
